zh.lifeSummary: 當Gijsbert I van Bronckhorst於1092年出生在荷蘭蓋爾德藍德布洛可斯特時，他的父親Arnold I Robertsz van Heusden van Rode32歲，母親Heylwiva de Walbeck27歲。他於1130年與Heilwige van Roode結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1175年9月7日在荷蘭蓋爾德藍德斯廷德倫布洛霍斯特享年83歲，埋葬在荷蘭蓋爾德藍德布洛可斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gijsbert I van Bronckhorst于1092年出生在荷兰蓋爾德藍德布洛可斯特时，他的父亲Arnold I Robertsz van Heusden van Rode32岁，母亲Heylwiva de Walbeck27岁。他于1130年与Heilwige van Roode结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1175年9月7日在荷兰蓋爾德藍德斯廷德倫布洛霍斯特享年83岁，埋葬在荷兰蓋爾德藍德布洛可斯特。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Bronckhorst
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: habitational name from a small town called Bronkhorst by the river Ijssel near Steenderen in Gelderland province. The placename derives from bronk see Bronk + horst ‘higher located brushwood’.

variants.name: Brunkhorst
meanings: North German: habitational name from a place called Brunkhorst, a cognate of the Dutch name   Bronkhorst  .

variants.name: Bronk
meanings: Dutch: nickname for someone known for sulking or flaunting behavior, from bronken (brunken, perhaps also pronken) ‘to sulk, to strut, to flaunt’.
Dutch: from the personal name Bronne, a variant of Bruno + the diminutive suffix -ke.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name from the village of Bronki, in eastern Poland.

en.lifeSummary: When Gijsbert I van Bronckhorst was born in 1092, in Bronckhorst, Gelderland, Netherlands, his father, Arnold I Robertsz van Heusden van Rode, was 32 and his mother, Heylwiva de Walbeck, was 27. He married Heilwige van Roode in 1130. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 7 September 1175, in Bronkhorst, Steenderen, Gelderland, Netherlands, at the age of 83, and was buried in Bronckhorst, Gelderland, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gijsbert I van Bronckhorst est né en 1092, à Bronckhorst, Gueldre, Pays-Bas, son père, Arnold I Robertsz van Heusden van Rode, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Heylwiva de Walbeck, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Heilwige van Roode en 1130. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 7 septembre 1175, à Bronkhorst, Steenderen, Gueldre, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterré à Bronckhorst, Gueldre, Pays-Bas.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gijsbert I van Bronckhorst 1092 in Bronckhorst, Geldern, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Arnold I Robertsz van Heusden van Rode 32 und seine Mutter Heylwiva de Walbeck 27. Er hat 1130 Heilwige van Roode geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 7. September 1175 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Bronkhorst, Steenderen, Geldern, Niederlande und wurde in Bronckhorst, Geldern, Niederlande begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gijsbert I van Bronckhorst è nato il nel 1092 nel Bronckhorst, Gelderland, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Arnold I Robertsz van Heusden van Rode, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Heylwiva de Walbeck, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Heilwige van Roode nel 1130. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 7 settembre 1175, nel Bronkhorst, Steenderen, Gelderland, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolto a Bronckhorst, Gelderland, Paesi Bassi.

ja.lifeSummary: Gijsbert I van Bronckhorstが1092年にオランダジェルダーランドブロンックhオルストで生まれた時，父Arnold I Robertsz van Heusden van Rodeは32歳，母Heylwiva de Walbeckは27歳であった。1130年にHeilwige van Roodeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1175年9月7日にオランダジェルダーランドスティーンデレンブロンクhオルストで83歳で死去し，オランダジェルダーランドブロンックhオルストにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gijsbert I van Bronckhorst(이)가 1092년 네덜란드 글델랜드 브론크호르스트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Arnold I Robertsz van Heusden van Rode(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Heylwiva de Walbeck(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1130년 Heilwige van Roode(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1175년 9월 7일 네덜란드 글델랜드 스티더 브론k호르스트에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 글델랜드 브론크호르스트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gijsbert I van Bronckhorst nasceu em 1092, em Bronckhorst, Gheldria, Países Baixos, seu pai, Arnold I Robertsz van Heusden van Rode, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Heylwiva de Walbeck, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Heilwige van Roode em 1130. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 7 de setembro de 1175, em Bronkhorst, Steenderen, Gheldria, Países Baixos, com 83 anos, e foi sepultado em Bronckhorst, Gheldria, Países Baixos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gijsbert I van Bronckhorst родился в 1092 г. в местности бронккхаурст, джелдирланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Arnold I Robertsz van Heusden van Rode было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Heylwiva de Walbeck, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Heilwige van Roode в 1130 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 7 сентября 1175 г. в местности бронхаурст, стиндирен, джелдирланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 83 лет и был похоронен в местности бронккхаурст, джелдирланд, Нидерланды.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gijsbert I van Bronckhorst nació en 1092, en Bronckhorst, Gelderland, Países Bajos, su papá, Arnold I Robertsz van Heusden van Rode, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Heylwiva de Walbeck, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Heilwige van Roode en 1130. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 7 de septiembre de 1175, en Bronkhorst, Steenderen, Gelderland, Países Bajos, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultado en Bronckhorst, Gelderland, Países Bajos.
